<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"customer":{"type":"object","properties":{"firstName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer first (given) name. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"lastName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer last (family) name. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"email":{"type":"string","description":"E-mail address of customer. MUST be valid email according to [RFC 2822](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc2822)."},"phone":{"type":"string","description":"Mobile phone number with country code (including leading `+`)."},"externalId":{"type":"string","description":"Unique customer's identifier in partner's system. Typically used for linking request and response together."}},"required":["firstName","lastName","email","phone","externalId"],"description":"Customer data"}},"required":["customer"],"example":{"customer":{"firstName":"John","lastName":"Newborn","email":"john.newborn@country.com","phone":"+420777123456","externalId":"1576849"}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"recommendation":{"type":"boolean","description":"A recommendation of whether the order should be passed to the HCO.\n\n    true = Application is likely going to be approved.\nfalse = Application is likely going to be rejected."},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Custom message for customer."},"id":{"type":"string","description":"Unique identificator of Precheck. Send this identificator in ApplicationRequest to improve approval rate."},"customer":{"type":"object","properties":{"firstName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer first (given) name. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"lastName":{"type":"string","description":"Customer last (family) name. String values longer than 100 characters will be shortened to 100 characters."},"email":{"type":"string","description":"E-mail address of customer. MUST be valid email according to [RFC 2822](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc2822)."},"phone":{"type":"string","description":"Mobile phone number with country code (including leading `+`)."},"externalId":{"type":"string","description":"Unique customer's identifier in partner's system. Typically used for linking request and response together."}},"required":["firstName","lastName","email","phone","externalId"],"description":"Customer data"},"potentialCreditAmount":{"type":"object","properties":{"amount":{"type":"number","description":"Amount in minor units (133000 represents 1330) [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217)"},"currency":{"type":"string","description":"Amount currency [ISO 4217](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_4217). Only local currency is allowed (CZK in Czech Republic and EUR in Slovakia)."}},"required":["amount","currency"],"description":"Probable credit amount customer will be able to borrow, estimated on the basis of provided data."}},"required":["id","recommendation","customer","potentialCreditAmount"]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"recommendation":false,"message":"V HCO peněžence nemáte dostatečný limit.","id":"1234","customer":{"firstName":"John","lastName":"Newborn","email":"john.newborn@country.com","phone":"+420777123456","externalId":"1576849"},"potentialCreditAmount":{"amount":133000,"currency":"CZK"}}}}}}},"400":{"description":"    Error in processing request","headers":{},"content":{"application/json;charset=UTF-8":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"errors":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"code":{"type":"string","description":"Unique internal error code"},"message":{"type":"string","description":"Human readable error description (non-localized)"},"severity":{"type":"string","enum":["ERROR","WARN","INFO"]},"attribute":{"type":"string","description":"JSON path of request attribute that caused the error (if applicable)"},"ticketId":{"type":"string","description":"Internal ticket ID, used for error backtracking"}},"required":["code","message","severity"]},"description":"Array with errors"}},"required":["errors"]},"examples":{"response":{"value":{"errors":[{"code":"BAD_REQUEST","message":"Bad request","severity":"ERROR","attribute":"customer.addresses[1].streetNumber","ticketId":"UAT1:AMS:20160516-091658.450:45e4"}]}}}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
